Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Dalt Hotel L.P. is present. Represented by Valerie Strathan.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marcus Henderson is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-22-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
